message:
feat(ftui-core, ftui-layout): fix terminal size, layout rounding, and OSC compat

Core input_parser: update test comment to reflect that oversized bracket
paste end sequences are now handled by DoS protection fallback logic
rather than being dropped.

Core mux_passthrough: update OSC 8 test sequences from ST to BEL
terminator to match the rendering change, and fix tmux_wrap doubled-escape
assertion from 2 to 1 since BEL does not contain an ESC byte.

Core terminal_session: fix query_size() and fallback_size() to apply
minimum-viable-size clamping to the processed values (w2/h2) instead
of the raw values (w/h), ensuring padding/offset adjustments are not
silently discarded by the 2x2 floor.

Layout cache: switch from FxHasher to DefaultHasher (SipHash) for
constraint and intrinsic hashing to eliminate hash collision artifacts
that caused spurious cache misses with certain constraint patterns.

Layout lib: use checked_add for Breakpoints xl computation to avoid
overflow when lg is near u16::MAX. Simplify Flex::Around gap distribution
to use uniform nearest-integer rounding instead of asymmetric left/right
rounding, eliminating persistent left-drift bias. Handle FitContent in
the first layout pass (was previously only handled in second pass).
Fix FitContentBounded second-pass to use sizes[i] (actual first-pass
allocation) instead of hint.min for the preferred floor. Fix
round_layout_stable deficit distribution to handle cases where deficit
exceeds the number of items by looping. Rewrite redistribute_overflow
to batch reductions by sorted magnitude instead of single-element
iteration, changing O(overflow * n) to O(n log n).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
